settings_private_league_placeholder: Enter Private League - Full name including (PL#####)
settings_beta_warning: Warning: expect beta releases to break stuff and be generally annoying. Please join discord to tell me what to fix and watch me squirm
settings_bug_reports_desc: Creates a local diagnostics file with app version, OS/runtime info, selected non-sensitive settings, and recent redacted logs. Nothing is uploaded automatically. Review it before attaching.
settings_currency_names: Show currency names instead of icons (accessibility)
settings_reload_on_save: Automatically reload filter when switching an item's tier
settings_dev_mode_desc: Enables tools for plugin authors. Don't enable unless you're building a plugin.
settings_dev_load_unpacked_desc: Load an unpacked plugin dist directory containing manifest.json and plugin.js. Files are copied into Scalpel's plugin folder.
settings_dev_plugin_installed: Installed plugin "{id}". Restart Scalpel to load it.
settings_pc_default_base: Default all items to "Base" - can simplify unchecking unwanted mods
settings_pc_crafting_ready: PoE2: default white/magic items to "Crafting Ready" (base + ilvl + affixes)
settings_cs_empty_desc: Categories group cheat sheets and can be hotkeyed independently.
settings_mac_no_presets_hint: Save a regex in the Regex Tool first, then come back to assign a hotkey
settings_plg_all_installed: All registry plugins are already installed.
faq_tos_q: Is Scalpel compatible with GGG's Terms of Service?
faq_tos_a: Scalpel is an overlay that runs alongside PoE, not inside it. The only things it does to the game are: send a copy-to-clipboard request when you press the hotkey, edit your .filter file on disk, send /reloaditemfilter or /itemfilter commands when saving changes, and send whatever chat commands you bind in settings. It does not inject into the game, read game memory, or automate gameplay.
faq_poe2_a: If you're reading this it's PoE2 szn. Fire your hotkey in PoE2 and it will prompt you to restart to make the overlay stick to the new window. Sorry, just how that works.
faq_macros_a: That's not really a question but macros are a great way to set a hotkey/combo to almost anything. You can find Macros as a tab in Settings. Set one for /hideout or a chat to the @last person you talked to. Set one for any tab/feature in scalpel - my favorite is the whiteboard! Or, set one for your regex (See below!)
faq_macro_regex_q: How do I set a macro to my regex?
faq_macro_regex_a: You can add custom tags to your regexes in addition to the ones that Scalpel generates in an attempt to help you parse it later. If you add a tag containing the word "macro" anywhere in the tag, you can add a "Scalpel Macro" in settings to "Use Saved Regex" which will then show you all the macro-available regexes. This hotkey will enter it directly into your stash or vendor.
faq_sync_q: Wait so how does this online filter sync work?
faq_sync_a: Use online filter in Scalpel -> it creates a local version that it edits that is locally "linked" to your online filter -> you update your online filter -> you hit "check for filter updates" -> Scalpel syncs changes from your online filter. Mostly correctly.
faq_sound_packs_q: How do I use custom sound packs?
faq_sound_packs_a: Drop your .mp3 files into your filter folder (Documents/My Games/Path of Exile). They'll appear in the sound dropdown alongside built-in sounds when editing a filter block.
faq_detect_q: Scalpel doesn't detect my items / hotkey doesn't work
faq_detect_a: If you run Path of Exile in elevated admin mode, you need to run Scalpel as administrator too. Right-click Scalpel.exe and select 'Run as administrator'.
faq_overlay_q: The overlay doesn't appear over my game
faq_overlay_a: Scalpel only works in Borderless Windowed or Windowed mode. Fullscreen is not supported. You can change this in PoE's graphics settings.
faq_filter_updates_q: I updated my filter online but Scalpel doesn't see the changes
faq_filter_updates_a: Click 'Check for Filter Updates' in the overlay header. This tells PoE to re-download the online filter, then Scalpel detects the change.
faq_changes_lost_q: My filter changes were lost after updating
faq_changes_lost_a: Starting from v0.7.4, Scalpel records your changes and replays them when you update. If you were on an older version, your first update after upgrading will reset your filter to the online version. Changes made after that are preserved.
faq_hideout_q: The 'Go to Hideout' button stopped working
faq_hideout_a: The trade site login session expires after a while. Go to Settings > Trade site login and log in again to refresh it.
faq_bad_currency_q: Bad currencies are still showing up after I hide them
faq_bad_currency_a: Low level zones will still show bad currencies because they are in special tiers for leveling and Scalpel does not know the zone level you are in.
faq_update_q: I can't seem to update Scalpel
faq_update_a: In some cases your antivirus may block the folder that the updates go to. Check that AppData/Roaming is not being blocked by AV. This has helped some people.
onb_welcome_subtitle: Path of Exile's first fourth-party tool. Select which game(s) you play to get started.
onb_folder_subtitle: Choose your filter folder, generally {hint}, so Scalpel can find your filters. You can skip this and set it up later from settings.
onb_filter_subtitle: Pick your starting filter, or skip this for now and add one later from settings. If you select an online filter, it will be resaved locally for fast editing.
onb_online_subtitle: "{filter}.filter" has been copied to your filter folder. You need to select it in Path of Exile's settings so the game uses it.
onb_online_step1: Open Options in Path of Exile
onb_online_step3: Under Item Filter, select {filter} from the dropdown
onb_hotkey_subtitle: This key combo activates the overlay while you're in game. Hover an item and press it to analyze your filter.
onb_pc_hotkey_subtitle: This key combo is used to... price check items. You should know how to use this one.
onb_trade_subtitle: This is optional, but logging in lets you travel directly to a seller's hideout to buy items from within Scalpel.
onb_prefs_subtitle: You can always change these later from settings.
onb_prefs_reload: Reload filter in game on every change
onb_done_subtitle: Scalpel is running in your system tray. Hop into Path of Exile, hover an item, and press your hotkey to get started. Feel free to close this window.
banner_update_ready: Scalpel Update Ready (v{version}) - restart to apply
banner_bricked: This version (v{version}) can't auto-update. Download the latest installer to continue.
overlay_needs_elevation: Can't read items. If PoE is running as admin, Scalpel needs to be too.
audit_no_match: This item doesn't match any block in your filter.
audit_no_basetypes: The matched block doesn't list any base types.
audit_ex_tier: Exotic tiers don't list base types in the rule.
overlay_no_filter_body: Select your .filter file to get started.
overlay_no_item_body: Hover an item in PoE and press {hotkey}.
